title: Bright & Homely Stainless Steel Flask 500ML, Leak-Proof Reusable Water Bottle, Double Wall Vacuum Insulation
features: Stainless Steel Flask, Thermos, Double-Walled Insulation, Tea, Coffee
description: ⦁ Premium Stainless Steel Construction: Made from food-grade stainless steel that is rust- proof, corrosion-resistant, and built to last. ⦁ Double-Walled Insulation: Keeps your drinks hot for up to 12 hours or cold for up to 24 hours, making it perfect for travel, work, gym, and outdoor activities. ⦁ 500ml Capacity: Ideal size for all-day hydration without the need for frequent refills. ⦁ Leak-Proof & Spill-Proof Design: Equipped with a secure lid to prevent spills and leaks, giving you peace of mind during transport. ⦁ Portable & Stylish: Sleek, modern design with an ergonomic shape that fits easily in your hand or backpack. ⦁ Easy to Clean: Wide-mouth opening allows for easy cleaning and adding ice cubes.
